name: invoixe
description: Invoixe — GST billing, accounting & inventory platform (Powered by UniCord Tech)
author: UniCord Tech

scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web,ready --pad-prefix -c blue,magenta,green "npm run dev:server --silent" "npm run dev:client --silent" "node scripts/dev-ready.mjs"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @invoixe/api && npm run build --workspace @invoixe/web
scripts.db:rls: dotenv -e .env -- prisma db execute --file server/prisma/rls.sql --schema server/prisma/schema.prisma
